title: Green Lawn Spray, 120ml Green Grass Spray, Grass And Turf Paint, Yellow To Green Lawn Grass Paint, Grass Lawn Repair Spray, Grass Seed, Green Grass Spray For Lawn For Covers Brown Burn Patches On Lawn
features: ✁Wide Range of Applications: Revive the magnificence of your green space with Green Grass Spray. A versatile solution for any yard and patio, this product combats patchiness and aids effortless lawn repair.

✁Revitalize Your Lawn: Transform your lackluster lawn into a gorgeous green with our Green Grass Spray for Lawn. Designed to quickly cover brown spots caused by drought, sewage or dryness, this powerful formula revitalizes your turf and brings back its natural emerald green color.

✁Simple Usage: With our Green Grass Spray, effortlessly rejuvenate your lawn by applying it to problem areas and watching plants germinate within 4-7 days. Our plant-tethering technology ensures full coverage in just 17 days, keeping plants rooted to the soil for long-lasting results.

✁Environmentally Conscious: Our Green Grass Spray for Lawn revitalizes your lawn without any additives. Carefully selected ingredients make it safe for you, your family, and your pets, while ensuring a robust and healthy lawn.

✁Enhanced Growth & Liveliness: Our Green Grass Spray for Lawn enriched with a plant nutrient solution, ensures improved soil quality resulting in an effervescent growth for your plants that flourish & enhance your lawn's natural beauty, leaving a lasting impression.
description: Product description Revitalize your lawn with Green Grass Spray! Our safe and gentle formula works to improve soil quality and provide full coverage in just 17 days. Perfect for your patio, bring your lawn back to life with this easy-to-use spray. Specification: Product name: Green Grass Spray for Lawn Product size: about 4x16.8cm/1.57x6.61 inches Product weight: about 145g Net content: about 120ml Packing List: 1 x Green Grass Spray for Lawn Note: Due to different lighting and screen settings, the item color may be slightly different from the picture. Due to different manual measurements, please allow a 1-2cm difference in size. Directions Effortlessly rejuvenate your lawn by applying the Green Grass Spray to problem areas and watch plants germinate within 4-7 days. Ensure full coverage in just 17 days, keeping plants rooted to the soil for long-lasting results. Safety Warning Use with care. Keep out of reach of children and pets. For external use only. In case of accidental ingestion, seek medical advice. Avoid contact with eyes. If skin or eye irritation occurs, rinse thoroughly with water. This product is safe for families and pets and is environmentally friendly. See more
